sectors.news_driver: RBI clears Kotak Bank to raise stake up to 9.99% in AU Small Finance, Federal Bank

stocks.name: Kotak Mahindra Bank
stocks.reason: RBI approval for stake increase -> increased control and potential synergies -> revenue growth of 5-7% in Q1

stocks.name: AU Small Finance Bank
stocks.reason: Kotak Bank's stake increase -> potential access to larger customer base and resources -> deposit growth of 10-12% in Q2

stocks.name: Federal Bank
stocks.reason: RBI approval for Kotak Bank's stake increase -> potential competition for deposits and loans -> margins compression of -50bps in Q3

sectors.news_driver: Paytm rules out NBFC licence plans after RBI cancels PPBL's banking licence

stocks.name: Paytm
stocks.reason: RBI's cancellation of PPBL's banking licence -> reduced chances of Paytm getting an NBFC licence -> revenue growth reduction of -5% in Q2

sectors.news_driver: Wall Street's rally on peace talk progress

stocks.name: HDFC Bank
stocks.reason: Wall Street's rally -> increased investor sentiment -> net interest income growth of 8-10% in Q3

stocks.name: Brigade Enterprises
stocks.reason: Bonus issue -> increased investor confidence -> sales growth of 12-15% in Q2
